news.t: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
Pictet Asset Management appoints Benjamin Becker as Head of US ETF Distribution
Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PQNT is an equity ETF with a total of 311 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.99%, AstraZeneca at 1.92%, Kioxia Holdings at 1.68%, Roche Holding AG at 1.32%, and Novartis AG at 1.26%.

overview.description: The Pictet AI Enhanced International Equity ETF (PQNT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE index. The fund is an actively managed ETF that employs artificial intelligence in selecting large- and mid-cap companies from developed markets, excluding North America. PQNT was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Pictet.

data.title: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
data.text: The rapid deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) is evident; 99% of CEOs say their companies are investing in the technology. Apparently, AI is also quick at garnering assets.

data.title: Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs

data.title: Pictet Asset Management appoints Benjamin Becker as Head of US ETF Distribution
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pictet Asset Management today announced the appointment of Benjamin Becker as Head of US ETF Distribution.

data.title: Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pictet Asset Management announced the launch of three actively-managed ETFs to bring the strategies to U.S. financial advisors and investors.
